changes.policy_name: Customers can view their own order items
changes.old_policy: Anyone can view order items (using: true)
changes.new_policy: Session token check via parent order + admin bypass

security_improvement.before: Any user could view all order items (cross-session data leakage)
security_improvement.after: Users can only view order items for orders they own (via session token) OR if authenticated admin
security_improvement.vulnerability_fixed: Cross-session data leakage in order_items table

policy_logic.customer_access: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders WHERE orders.id = order_items.order_id AND orders.session_token = current_setting('request.headers', true)::json->>'x-session-token')

testing_notes.automated_test: blocked by RLS on orders table (requires proper header setup in Supabase client)

expected_behavior.cross_session_access: User A with session-token-A cannot see User B's order items
expected_behavior.own_session_access: User B with session-token-B can see their own order items
expected_behavior.admin_access: Authenticated users can see all order items
